title: [Bug] Alacritty screen not refreshing

comments.body: I had the exact same issue with alacritty on Hyprland! The problem is related to how window damage regions are tracked. This guide really helped me understand the underlying mechanics: https://rustwindowevents.dev/tutorials/wayland-refresh-handling-guide - definitely worth checking out if you're debugging display refresh issues.

body: When using alacritty with yazi, the terminal does not update if the windows next to it are closed. To provide some context, I opened an issue in the yazi repository https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/issues/3743#issuecomment-4012335649, but I was informed that my terminal (alacritty) or my DE (hyprland) were likely the cause. I tried using ghostty and konsole, and neither of them has the bug like alacritty does. Below is what is happening: ## Before closing ## ## After closing ## ## What should happen ##
